name: Sauerkrautsalat Mit Schinken (Sauerkraut Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the sauerkraut.
2. Chop the sauerkraut coarsely.
3. Wash the grapes and cut them in half; remove seeds if desired.
4. Cut the ham into julienne strips.
5. Gently mix the chopped sauerkraut, halved grapes, and sliced ham together.
6. Blend the dressing ingredients: 1/2 cup yogurt, 1/4 teaspoon white pepper, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and 1 teaspoon honey until smooth.
7. Stir the blended dressing into the sauerkraut mixture.
8. Marinate for 10 minutes, then adjust seasoning before serving if necessary.
